blocks.text:
I'm **Claude**, an AI assistant built by Anthropic, currently running as a **Claude Code agent** (Claude Opus 4.6). I'm set up in your workspace at `/home/bellman/Workspace/clawd-code/rust` with the **oh-my-claudecode (OMC)** orchestration layer active.

Here's what I can help you with:

- **Software engineering tasks** — reading, writing, and refactoring code
- **Debugging** — diagnosing issues, running tests, tracing errors
- **Research & planning** — exploring codebases, understanding architecture, planning changes
- **Shell commands** — building, testing, running tools in your environment
- **Multi-agent workflows** — delegating specialized work (reviews, deep analysis, etc.) via OMC

I have access to your local filesystem, can execute shell commands, search the web, and coordinate specialized sub-agents for complex tasks.

What can I help you with today?
